title: Key
description: PsychoPy Keyboard component for capturing keyboard input

id.description: Unique identifier for the keyboard component

allowedKeys.description: A comma-separated list of keys (with quotes), such as 'q','right','space','left'

forceEndRoutine.description: Should a response force the end of the Routine (e.g end the trial)?

minTime.description: Minimum time to capture keyboard input in milliseconds

maxTime.description: Maximum time to capture keyboard input in milliseconds
